name: launchd-monitor
title: Launchd Monitor
description: Monitor your macOS launchd jobs from the menu bar. See job status, last run times, failures, and re-run jobs on demand.
author: wesbaker

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Launchd Job Status
commands.subtitle: Launchd Monitor
commands.description: Shows launchd job status in the menu bar

preferences.name: launchdLabels
preferences.title: Launchd Job Labels
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of launchd job labels to monitor
